overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring ancient Alexandria during golden hour. The character walks through cobblestone streets and courtyards with classical Roman-Egyptian architecture, passing NPCs and market stalls while the camera smoothly follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city main thoroughfare with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the main cobblestone street between classical buildings

entered.detail: weathered stone paving with irregular tiles running the length of the street
two-story structures with red and white painted walls and wooden balconies
classical architecture with columns and hanging fabric awnings
tall palm trees visible above the rooftops in the distance
lit torches mounted on building walls providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide cobblestone street lined with classical Roman-Egyptian buildings during golden hour. Palm trees rise above the rooftops in the distance while warm torchlight glows from wall-mounted lanterns. Sparse pedestrians wander along the sidewalks as the camera follows the character's steady forward movement.

events.description: turns right from main street into enclosed building courtyard

agents.ego_description: turning right and entering a courtyard area with stairs ahead

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue tunic walking across the courtyard toward the left

entered.detail: tall stone columns with decorative capitals flanking the courtyard entrance
wide stone steps leading upward to the next level of the complex
large terracotta vessels stacked near the building walls
wooden stall table with goods displayed for sale

segments.scene_description: The character turns right from the main street into a semi-enclosed courtyard with classical columns. A stone staircase rises ahead toward an upper level while clay storage pots and a wooden market table occupy the right side. An NPC in a blue tunic crosses the courtyard as the character enters the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with decorative floor rugs

events.description: ascends stone stairs and enters narrow covered passage

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and proceeding through narrow alley passage

notable_agents.action: NPC in gray tunic walking toward the character through the alley

entered.detail: tall plastered walls with red and white paint creating a narrow corridor
colorful woven rugs laid across the stone floor of the passage
oversized clay vessels positioned against the alley walls
stone arch marking the exit from the narrow alley

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the stone stairs into a narrow enclosed alley with high walls on both sides. Decorative rugs line the floor while large terracotta pots stand against the walls. An NPC approaches from the opposite direction as the character moves toward the archway exit at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with high stone walls and service area

events.description: exits narrow alley into open courtyard with high stone walls
turns left into side street with wooden cart and storage racks

agents.ego_description: walking through open courtyard and along stone walls with hay cart

entered.detail: tall defensive stone wall with weathered blocks and mounted torches
wooden cart loaded with hay bales parked against the wall
shelving units holding rolled fabrics and storage items
lit torches mounted at intervals along the stone walls

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the character enters an open courtyard bordered by high stone walls. The space contains a hay cart and wooden storage racks against the right wall, illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The character turns left and proceeds along the cobblestone path, passing through a quiet service area with no other people present.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with fabric merchant stalls

agents.ego_description: walking past fabric merchant stalls along the cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: NPC in blue dress standing near building entrance observing the street

entered.detail: market stall with colorful rolled fabrics and textiles displayed under an awning
dense green trees visible beyond the street buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a medium-width street lined with a fabric merchant stall on the left displaying colorful textiles. The high stone wall continues on the right while trees become visible in the distance ahead. An NPC stands near a building entrance on the left as the character continues down the cobblestone path through the historic market area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the streets of Alexandria, transitioning from a wide public thoroughfare into a series of enclosed courtyards and narrow alleys before returning to an open market area. It begins with the character walking along a wide cobblestone street lined with Roman-Egyptian buildings and glowing lanterns under the warm light of golden hour. As the character turns right, the scene shifts into a semi-enclosed courtyard featuring classical columns and stone stairs, which the camera then follows upward into a narrow, rug-lined alleyway. The perspective emerges from this confined passage into a quiet service courtyard with hay carts and torches before turning left to rejoin a medium-width street. Finally, the environment opens up into a historic market district, passing colorful fabric stalls and high stone walls as trees appear in the distance.
